title: Your Phone Owns You | Ferrum Doctrine Stickman
description:
If your attention is for rent, your life is already owned.

First sixty minutes tomorrow — no phone. Fail and you stay leased. Decide.

Ferrum Doctrine — Manim cinematic stickman combat lessons.
